_comment: PROJECT-local Claude Code settings for the dotfiles repo. Merges with user-global settings at ~/.config/claude/settings.json (precedence across scopes: deny > ask > allow). Only TRUE overrides live here. Anything already allowed globally (git add/commit, brew *) is omitted as redundant. We promote a few common write/admin ops out of the global 'ask' because we trust them in this repo. The most destructive ops (rm, git reset/clean/push --force, etc.) deliberately stay in the global 'ask' net and are NOT promoted here.
